channel.title: port - writing
channel.description: Articles by port about developer tools, AI coding workflows, and Monad development.

item.title: You are prompting GPT 5.5 wrong.
item.description: A short guide to prompting GPT 5.5 in Codex by describing the outcome, removing preamble, biasing to action, parallelizing reads, and verifying work.

item.title: so... how to create a skill that works?
item.description: A practical process for creating skill files by finding model failures, patching knowledge gaps, and benchmarking the result.

item.title: Skills don't work the way we think they do
item.description: Notes on the SkillBench paper and what it says about curated skills, self-generated skills, and agent performance.

item.title: You don't know how to vibe-code
item.description: A practical methodology for using AI coding agents without losing control of the codebase.
